## Description

<!-- Brief description of what this PR changes and why -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature or enhancement
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation update
- [ ] test: Test addition or fix
- [ ] chore: Maintenance (deps, config, CI)
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring without behavior change
- [ ] ci: CI/CD pipeline change
- [ ] perf: Performance improvement

## Complexity Classification

<!-- Per Cognitive OS spec, classify this change -->

- [ ] T0 (Trivial): Single-file edit, typo fix
- [ ] T1 (Standard): Multi-file change within one system
- [ ] T2 (Complex): Cross-system, architectural
- [ ] T3 (Critical): Security-sensitive, production-affecting
- [ ] T4 (Existential): Large refactor, breaking change

## Testing Done

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (lint + format + test)
- [ ] All markdown files pass markdownlint
- [ ] All internal links resolve
- [ ] Harness adapters remain consistent with master AGENTS.md

## Checklist

- [ ] Pre-commit hooks passed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in diff
- [ ] If modifying AGENTS.md, the change follows the living document principle (amend, never amend silently)
- [ ] Harness adapter files updated if master spec changed
